positive: A whimsical, minimalist design featuring a grouping of stylized constellations and mythical celestial animals (such as a serene unicorn silhouette, a soaring griffin, and a majestic dragon) intertwined with flowing astronomical patterns. The style is geometric abstract, reminiscent of Art Deco mixed with modern line art, rendered in deep indigo, gold foil, and pearlescent white ink. Focus on clean, solid black and gold lines, creating high contrast against a subtle midnight background. The composition must be centrally arranged, scalable, and suitable for repeating apparel print, utilizing strong negative space and clean, defined silhouettes. High detail, crisp lines, professional vector graphic quality.
negative: blur, low resolution, messy, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, grainy, realistic photo
